tool.name: Azure Logic Apps
tool.description: iPaaS workflow automation service with AI-enhanced orchestration and broad connector coverage.
tool.logoNotes: Official Microsoft Azure architecture/service icon from Azure_Public_Service_Icons_V23.
tool.practitionerNote: Best when the core problem is governed enterprise workflow automation with Azure connectors, not frontier agent behaviour or open-ended autonomy.

dataResidency.detail: Standard/ASE v3 keep data in-region; Consumption uses paired-region replication.

deployment.detail: Consumption (multi-tenant), Standard single-tenant, ASE v3, and Hybrid (on-prem via Container Apps).

auditLogging.detail: Run/trigger history and diagnostics to Azure Monitor / Log Analytics.

soc2.detail: In-scope Azure service under SOC 2 Type 2.

iso42001.detail: Microsoft's ISO 42001 scope names Copilot products and Foundry; Logic Apps is not individually listed.

euAiAct.detail: General-purpose workflow automation, not an AI system; obligations depend on integrated components.

licenseRisk.detail: Proprietary Microsoft service; no source access.
